_doc: Independent verification sources per Valuation Policy Section 7. Asset-level verifiers cross-check primary oracle prices against issuer attestations or NAV reports. Portfolio-level verifiers compare aggregate totals against independent aggregators.

mHYPER._note: Midas Hyperithm PoR attestation via LlamaRisk. Multi-chain OFT — totalSupply summed across all deployment chains. Addresses from docs.midas.app/resources/smart-contracts-registry. NAV updated ~2x/week. Verified by LlamaRisk + Canary via zk_tls_notary.

msyrupUSDp._note: Midas msyrupUSDp weekly PDF reports on Google Drive. Reports published every 3-4 days. OCR extraction of Total assets / Issued tokens to derive per-token price.

mF-ONE._note: Midas mF-ONE daily PDF reports on Google Drive. Reports published daily. OCR extraction of Total assets / Issued tokens to derive per-token price.

ONyc._note: OnRe on-chain NAV from Offer PDA on Solana. Computes price from APR-based step vectors. Config in solana_protocols.json.

USCC._note: Superstate Crypto Carry Fund. Daily NAV/S via REST API. Verification cross-check against Chainlink NAVLink oracle price.

debank._noise_filter_note: Operational filter only. Tokens where both our value and DeBank value are below this amount are skipped to avoid dust/spam false positives. Not a policy threshold.
debank._note: EVM-only portfolio aggregator. Compares aggregate and token-level DeBank values against our NAV. API key in DEBANK_API_KEY env var.
